title: Scalability & Computational Cost Analysis: Timing Breakdowns, Scaling Laws, and Overhead Assessment
summary: Demo notebook for the Scalability & Computational Cost Analysis of Balance-Guided Oblique Trees. Loads pre-computed timing data (64 rows: 8 datasets x 8 methods) and reproduces all 6 analyses: (A) timing breakdown table, (B) scaling with n via power-law fits, (C) scaling with d + CoI complexity validation (exponent 1.69, R²=0.96), (D) overhead ratio cost-benefit (15/24 justified), (E) cross-method comparison (FIGS 21.25x faster than EBM), (F) summary statistics. Includes a 4-panel matplotlib visualization.
